reason: Verify Issue #8 implementation stays within MVP voice requirements and privacy boundaries.
Verify implementation matches the planned WebView2 + LiveKit media architecture.
Check no Go audio capture/playback/mixing pipeline is introduced.
Check no LiveKit token or secret is persisted in code, logs, or docs.
Check automated tests are not misrepresented as replacing Windows HITL audio acceptance.
Check Wails frontend build, spike isolation, and existing scaffold contracts remain valid.
Check Issue #8 does not regress or duplicate existing device/tray decisions.
